sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11317" key="a(palokouri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁπᾰλο-κουρίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n11317.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἁπαλὴ κουρίς</ref></xr>, or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καρίς,</foreign> cj. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:44:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
